chosen_action.title: Upgraded primary-repo-flat publisher packet to prefer real contact routes over weak role emails

why_this_action.summary: The current short review window still blocks another truthful outbound send, but the active shared publisher-contact packet was steering NxCode toward legal/privacy/support addresses and TIMEWELL toward generic placeholder-tainted email extraction. Improving contact-route quality now increases the odds that the scheduled post-hold lane produces a real Codeberg-first contact attempt instead of a weak or misrouted handoff.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet remains the active lane during the hold window
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists before short-window congestion clears
primary_repo_flat_contact_discovery_latest.json: NxCode and TIMEWELL were still in the live prepared set
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
https://www.nxcode.io/ar/contact: public contact path is live
https://timewell.jp/company: public company/contact path is live
repair_scope: demote weak role emails like legal@/privacy@/support@ behind real website contact routes
stop explicit NxCode/TIMEWELL discovery from leaning on legal/privacy pages
make timezone-aware packet refresh calls safe inside distribution_lane_executor
regenerate the canonical discovery and handoff packet artifacts so the scheduled rerun inherits the cleaner routes

result.summary: Patched contact discovery and packet selection so NxCode now leads with site contact paths instead of legal/privacy/support emails, TIMEWELL now leads with public company/contact routes instead of placeholder-tainted email extraction, and packet refreshes are safe with timezone-aware datetimes. Regenerated the canonical primary-repo-flat discovery + handoff artifacts for the next post-hold run.

artifact_checks: NxCode recommended_next_step == public website contact path is now identified
NxCode first channel now resolves to a site contact path rather than legal/privacy/support email
TIMEWELL recommended_next_step == public website contact path is now identified
